description: AMISelectorTerm defines selection logic for an ami used by Karpenter to launch nodes. If multiple fields are used for selection, the requirements are ANDed.

id.description: ID is the ami id in EC2

name.description: Name is the ami name in EC2. This value is the name field, which is different from the name tag.

owner.description: Owner is the owner for the ami. You can specify a combination of AWS account IDs, "self", "amazon", and "aws-marketplace"

tags.description: Tags is a map of key/value tags used to select subnets Specifying '*' for a value selects all values for a given tag key.
